settings.slide_description: Deep hydration & barrier repair for a plump, glowing complexion

settings.item_text: Step 1: Round Lab Cleansing Water – Removes sunscreen & makeup without irritation
Step 2: COSRX Low pH Good Morning Cleanser – A gentle, non-stripping cleanse
Toner: Eqqualberry Swimming Pool Toner, hydrates, brightens & reduces irritation
Serum: Anua TXA 10% Serum – Brightens skin without aggravating fungal acne (contains tranexamic acid, which is safe for fungal acne when formulated without esters or oils)
Exfoliator: Dr. G Brightening Peeling Gel – Safe, non-irritating exfoliation
Moisturizer: Purito B5 Panthenol Re-Barrier Cream – Fungal acne-safe hydration
Sunscreen: Isntree Onion Newpair Sunscreen – Calms inflammation while providing sun protection

settings.heading: SKINCARE SPOTLIGHT
settings.subheading: Here's why we have over 40K five-star reviews

settings.review_text: I’ve been loving milky toners/essences! So I had to try this one which I’m glad I did because I ended up loving it! It’s the perfect amount of thickness & creaminess. It’s perfect because it works for makeup prep. I use this every time I do my makeup! Definitely a must have for me now!
settings.position: Haruharu Wonder Black Rice Probiotics Essence

settings.review_text: Katie recommended the best products for my skin!! After using them my face felt so soft, hydrated and firm. My favorite was these ampoule drops- I use them morning and night and they give my skin the best glow. Can’t recommend Katie & her products recommendations enough 🙌🏻❤️
I sometimes get redness around my nose & this serum always gets rid of my redness! It also doesn’t have a scent which I love. It’s such a great addition to my routine!
I really like the texture of this moisturizer. Lightweight & leaves my skin feeling smooth and hydrated!
